description: Convert a phylogenetic tree between ETE Newick format specifications (e.g. format 0 flexible-with-lengths -> format 1 with internal names).
rules: read-only on input — emits a new tree file, never edits the source
IN_FORMAT / OUT_FORMAT are ETE Newick format numbers (0-100)
converted tree (converted.nw) + run log (convert.log) written under record_store
usage: Set TREE_FILE (input Newick tree), IN_FORMAT (default 0), OUT_FORMAT (default 1). Outputs: convert.log (always) and converted.nw (when ete3 present).
limitation: Requires ete3 to actually parse/rewrite; without it the porter records an ete3-missing note in convert.log and exits 0 (no converted.nw is produced).
